name: obsidian-mcp-secure
description: Secure MCP server that turns your Obsidian vault into a reliable data source for Claude Desktop — OWASP Top 10 controls and full audit logging.
long_description: Bridge between Claude Desktop and Obsidian via the Local REST API plugin. Provides 9 tools (read, list, create, edit, delete, search, find by name, list tags, create backlinks) with path traversal blocking, Zod input validation, 512 KB payload limits, localhost-only connections, and a full audit log with rotation.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List files/folders in the vault or a subdirectory

tools.name: edit_note
tools.description: Overwrite an existing note (previous content goes to the audit log)

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note — requires confirm: true

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Full-text / tag search using Obsidian's own search engine

tools.name: find_note_by_name
tools.description: Find notes by partial name — case-insensitive, no exact path needed

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: Enumerate all tags in the vault with usage count

tools.name: create_backlinks
tools.description: Add [[wikilinks]] to connect related notes in a Relacionadas section

api_key.title: Obsidian API Key
api_key.description: API key from the Local REST API plugin (Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins → Local REST API)

host.title: Obsidian Host
host.description: Host of the Obsidian Local REST API. Only 127.0.0.1 and localhost are accepted.

port.title: Obsidian Port
port.description: Port of the Obsidian Local REST API plugin.
